title: CMD.CHN.001.DSH.RECORD_DASHBOARD_VIEW — Record an explicit dashboard consultation
description: Payload of the RECORD_DASHBOARD_VIEW command. Issued by the mobile frontend when the beneficiary opens or refreshes the dashboard tab. Handled by AGG.CHN.001.DSH.BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD. Emits BNK.RLVR.RVT.CHN.001.DASHBOARD_VIEWED ONLY when (now - last_viewed_at) >= 30s (INV.DSH.004); inside the debounce window the command is acked as an idempotent no-op (HTTP 200, no event emitted). client_request_id provides 5-minute idempotency for accidental HTTP retries; the 30-second debounce is orthogonal and applies to bus-event emission, not to the HTTP response.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reliever participation case identifier. Must match the bearer token's beneficiary subject (channel-side authorization, ADR-TECH-STRAT-003).

client_request_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Client-generated unique identifier for this HTTP request (5-minute window). Allows safe retries of the POST without producing a second telemetry event.

viewed_at.description: Wall-clock instant at which the frontend observed the dashboard tab opening (ISO-8601, UTC recommended). Used by the BFF to validate plausible client clocks; the canonical timestamp persisted on the aggregate is the BFF's server time.

client_context.description: Optional client-side metadata for telemetry (PII-free). NEVER carries names, contact details, or geolocation.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. "fr-FR"). Used for downstream analytics segmentation.
